task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Samsung Galaxy Tab S8 Ultra (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1099.00 and wholesale is $769.00. Product features: Tablet with 14.6" Super AMOLED display and S Pen included. Reference: https://www.samsung.com/us/tablets/galaxy-tab-s8/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Samsung Galaxy Tab S8 Ultra. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Samsung Galaxy Tab S8 Ultra. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
